dnd5e-alert-initiative-swap.dialog.pickB: Choose a willing ally to swap initiative with:
dnd5e-alert-initiative-swap.prompt.title: Alert Feat
dnd5e-alert-initiative-swap.prompt.body: You have the Alert feat! You can swap your initiative with a willing ally. Swap now?
dnd5e-alert-initiative-swap.notify.windo: Alert: initiative can only be swapped after rolling, before combat starts.
dnd5e-alert-initiative-swap.notify.noAll: Alert: no eligible allies to swap initiative with.
dnd5e-alert-initiative-swap.notify.noGM: Alert: a GM must be online to swap initiative.
dnd5e-alert-initiative-swap.notify.pickA: Select an ally to swap initiative with.
dnd5e-alert-initiative-swap.settings.aut: Prompt Alert owners to swap initiative
After a player-owned character with the Alert feat rolls initiative (before combat starts), ask whether to swap with a willing ally.
